name: IRC_REQUISITIONS_VL
query: SELECT B.REQUISITION_ID, B.OBJECT_STATUS, B.REQUISITION_NUMBER, B.REQ_USAGE_CODE, B.RECRUITING_TYPE_CODE, B.CURRENT_PHASE_ID, B.CURRENT_STATE_ID, B.PROCESS_ID, B.PROCESS_TEMPLATE_ID, B.HIRING_MANAGER_ID, B.MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID, B.RECRUITER_ID, B.RECRUITER_ASSIGNMENT_ID, B.JOB_ID, B.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID, B.JOB_FAMILY_ID, B.JOB_FUNCTION_CODE, B.GEOGRAPHY_ID, B.GEOGRAPHY_NODE_ID, B.ORGANIZATION_ID, B.LEGAL_EMPLOYER_ID, B.GRADE_ID, B.DEPARTMENT_ID, TL.TITLE, TL.MANAGER_TITLE, TL.EXTERNAL_DESC, TL.EXTERNAL_DESC_HTML, TL.INTERNAL_DESC, TL.INTERNAL_DESC_HTML, TL.EXTERNAL_SHORT_DESC, TL.INTERNAL_SHORT_DESC, TL.EXTERNAL_RESP, TL.EXTERNAL_RESP_HTML, TL.INTERNAL_RESP, TL.INTERNAL_RESP_HTML, TL.EXTERNAL_QUAL, TL.EXTERNAL_QUAL_HTML, TL.INTERNAL_QUAL, TL.INTERNAL_QUAL_HTML, TL.NAME, B.JUSTIFICATION_CODE, B.NUMBER_TO_HIRE, B.UNLIMITED_HIRE_FLAG, B.HOT_JOB_FLAG, B.WORKPLACE_TYPE_CODE, B.WORK_START_DATE, B.WORK_END_DATE, B.EXT_CONTACT_NAME, B.EXT_CONTACT_EMAIL, B.INT_CONTACT_NAME, B.INT_CONTACT_EMAIL, B.INT_PUBLISH_JOB_STATUS, B.INT_PUBLISH_JOB_START_DATE, B.INT_PUBLISH_JOB_END_DATE, B.EXT_PUBLISH_JOB_STATUS, B.EXT_PUBLISH_JOB_START_DATE, B.EXT_PUBLISH_JOB_END_DATE, B.BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE, B.SOURCING_BUDGET, B.TRAVEL_BUDGET, B.RELOCATION_BUDGET, B.EMPLOYEE_REFERRAL_BONUS, B.MIN_SALARY, B.MAX_SALARY, B.SALARY_FREQUENCY_CODE, B.SALARY_CURRENCY_CODE, B.SALARY_PERIOD_CODE, B.REQ_LAST_MODIFIED_DATE, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.REQUISITION_TEMPLATE_ID, B.JOB_SHIFT_CODE, B.JOB_TYPE_CODE, B.STUDY_LEVEL_CODE, B.INT_EMPLOYER_DESC_ID, B.EXT_EMPLOYER_DESC_ID, B.INT_ORGANIZATION_DESC_ID, B.EXT_ORGANIZATION_DESC_ID, B.MANAGER_LEVEL, B.FULL_PART_TIME, B.WORKER_TYPE_CODE, B.LOCATION_ID, B.REGULAR_TEMPORARY, B.PROFILE_ID, B.DISPLAY_IN_ORG_CHART_FLAG, B.COMMENTS, B.HIRED_COUNT, B.SUBS_PROCESS_TEMPLATE_ID, B.EXTERNAL_APPLY_FLOW_ID, B.SYNC_JOB_VALUES_FLAG, B.PIPELINE_REQUISITION_ID, B.PIPELINE_REQUISITION_FLAG, B.APPLY_WHEN_NOT_POSTED_FLAG, B.POSITION_ID, B.AUTOMATIC_FILL_FLAG, B.EXTERNAL_DESCRIPTION_ID, B.INTERNAL_DESCRIPTION_ID, B.REQ_USAGE_TYPE, B.REQ_SOURCE_TYPE, B.OPEN_DATE, B.AUTO_OPEN_REQUISITION, B.POSTING_EXPIRE_IN_DAYS, B.UNPOST_FORMULA_ID, B.AUTO_UNPOST_REQUISITION, B.TN_AGENCY_STATUS_CODE, B.ATTRIBUTE_TIMESTAMP1, B.ATTRIBUTE_TIMESTAMP2, B.ATTRIBUTE_TIMESTAMP3, B.ATTRIBUTE_TIMESTAMP4, B.ATTRIBUTE_TIMESTAMP5, B.ATTRIBUTE_TIMESTAMP6, B.ATTRIBUTE_TIMESTAMP7, B.ATTRIBUTE_TIMESTAMP8, B.ATTRIBUTE_TIMESTAMP9, B.ATTRIBUTE_TIMESTAMP10, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR1, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR2, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR3, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR4, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR5, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR6, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR7, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR8, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR9, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR10, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR11, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR12, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR13, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR14, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR15, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR16, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR17, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR18, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR19, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR20, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR21, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR22, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR23, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR24, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR25, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR26, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR27, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR28, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR29, B.ATTRIBUTE_CHAR30, B.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, B.SUSPENDED_DURATION, B.FILLED_DATE, B.EXT_FIRST_POSTED_DATE, B.INT_FIRST_POSTED_DATE, B.APPROVED_DATE FROM IRC_REQUISITIONS_B B, IRC_REQUISITIONS_TL TL WHERE B.REQUISITION_ID = TL.REQUISITION_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
